description: A security mandate requires all new management traffic to use SNMPv3 with AuthPriv. A specification document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/snmpv3_mandate.txt. Read the document, then navigate to Settings > Discovery > Credentials in ManageEngine OpManager to create the two required SNMPv3 credential profiles with the exact cryptographic settings specified. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
